zh: 同病异治体现了辨证论治的灵活性。
en: Treating the same disease with different methods reflects the flexibility of treatment based on syndrome differentiation.

entities.en: treating the same disease with different methods

entities_gold.en: treating the same disease with different methods

entities_eval.en: treating the same disease with different methods

zh: 异病同治适用于不同疾病表现相同证候的情况。
en: Treating different diseases with the same therapy applies when different diseases manifest the same syndrome.

entities.en: treating different diseases with the same therapy

entities_gold.en: treating different diseases with the same therapy

entities_eval.en: treating different diseases with the same therapy

zh: 麻疹初期透疹不畅时应采用透疹法。
en: When measles eruption is delayed at the early stage, the eruption-promoting method should be applied.

zh: 肺热为主的麻疹中期应清泄肺热。
en: In the middle stage of measles dominated by lung heat, lung heat should be cleared.

zh: 阴阳学说可用于分析人体的生理活动。
en: Yin-Yang theory can be used to analyze physiological activities of the human body.

zh: 阴阳学说可用于说明疾病的病理变化。
en: Yin-Yang theory can be used to explain pathological changes of disease.

zh: 动属阳，静属阴。
en: Motion pertains to Yang, and stillness pertains to Yin.

zh: 外属阳，内属阴。
en: The exterior pertains to Yang, and the interior pertains to Yin.

zh: 上属阳，下属阴。
en: The upper pertains to Yang, and the lower pertains to Yin.

zh: 热属阳，寒属阴。
en: Heat pertains to Yang, and cold pertains to Yin.

zh: 功能属阳，物质属阴。
en: Function pertains to Yang, and substance pertains to Yin.

zh: 人体背部多属阳，腹部多属阴。
en: The back of the human body mostly pertains to Yang, while the abdomen mostly pertains to Yin.

zh: 四肢外侧多属阳，四肢内侧多属阴。
en: The lateral sides of the limbs mostly pertain to Yang, while the medial sides mostly pertain to Yin.

zh: 阴阳失去平衡可导致疾病发生。
en: Loss of balance between Yin and Yang can lead to disease.

zh: 阳胜则热，阴胜则寒。
en: Excess of Yang produces heat, while excess of Yin produces cold.

zh: 阳虚则寒，阴虚则热。
en: Yang deficiency produces cold, while Yin deficiency produces heat.

zh: 木具有生长和条达的特性。
en: Wood has the properties of growth and free unfolding.

zh: 火具有温热和升腾的特性。
en: Fire has the properties of warmth and upward flaring.

zh: 土具有生化和承载的特性。
en: Earth has the properties of generation, transformation and reception.

zh: 金具有肃降和收敛的特性。
en: Metal has the properties of purification, descending and astringing.

zh: 水具有滋润和下行的特性。
en: Water has the properties of moistening and flowing downward.

zh: 母病可以影响子脏。
en: Disease of the mother organ can affect the child organ.

zh: 子病也可以影响母脏。
en: Disease of the child organ can also affect the mother organ.

zh: 补母法用于治疗子脏虚证。
en: Reinforcing the mother is used to treat deficiency syndrome of the child organ.

zh: 泻子法用于治疗母脏实证。
en: Reducing the child is used to treat excess syndrome of the mother organ.

zh: 滋水涵木法通过滋肾阴以养肝阴。
en: Nourishing water to moisten wood nourishes liver Yin by enriching kidney Yin.

zh: 益火补土法通过温肾阳以助脾阳。
en: Benefiting fire to reinforce earth assists spleen Yang by warming kidney Yang.

zh: 金水相生法同时滋养肺肾。
en: Mutual promotion of metal and water nourishes the lungs and kidneys simultaneously.

entities.en: mutual promotion of metal and water

entities_gold.en: mutual promotion of metal and water

entities_eval.en: mutual promotion of metal and water

zh: 培土生金法通过健脾益气以补肺气。
en: Building up earth to generate metal replenishes lung Qi by strengthening the spleen and Qi.

entities.en: building up earth to generate metal

entities_gold.en: building up earth to generate metal

entities_eval.en: building up earth to generate metal

zh: 抑木扶土法通过疏肝健脾调和肝脾。
en: Inhibiting wood to support earth harmonizes the liver and spleen by soothing the liver and strengthening the spleen.

zh: 佐金平木法通过清肃肺气制约肝木。
en: Assisting metal to subdue wood restrains liver wood by purifying lung Qi.

zh: 泻南补北法通过泻心火以滋肾水。
en: Draining the south and tonifying the north nourishes kidney water by purging heart fire.

zh: 心主血脉依赖心气推动血行。
en: The heart governs blood and vessels by relying on heart Qi to propel blood circulation.

zh: 心神失养可导致精神活动异常。
en: Malnutrition of the mind can lead to abnormal mental activities.

zh: 肺为娇脏，易受外邪侵袭。
en: The lungs are delicate organs and are easily invaded by exogenous pathogens.

zh: 肺气宣发可将卫气布散于体表。
en: The dispersing function of lung Qi can distribute defensive Qi to the body surface.

zh: 肺气肃降可保持呼吸道清洁。
en: The descending function of lung Qi can keep the respiratory tract clear.

zh: 脾主运化水液以防止湿聚。
en: The spleen governs transformation of fluids to prevent dampness accumulation.

zh: 脾气升清可将精微输布于上。
en: Spleen Qi ascending the clear can distribute essence upward.

zh: 脾不统血可出现慢性出血。
en: Failure of the spleen to control blood can cause chronic bleeding.

entities_gold.en: failure of spleen to control blood

entities_model.en: failure of spleen to control blood

zh: 肝疏泄正常则气机调畅。
en: When liver free coursing is normal, Qi movement remains smooth.

zh: 肝藏血功能失常可影响月经。
en: Dysfunction of the liver in storing blood can affect menstruation.

zh: 肝血不足可使筋脉失养。
en: Insufficiency of liver blood can deprive tendons and vessels of nourishment.

zh: 肾精充足则髓海得养。
en: When kidney essence is sufficient, the sea of marrow is nourished.

zh: 肾气不固可导致二便失约。
en: Insecurity of kidney Qi can lead to failure to restrain urination and defecation.

zh: 小儿乳食不节容易损伤脾胃。
en: Improper feeding in children easily impairs the spleen and stomach.

zh: 小儿冷暖失调容易感受外邪。
en: Poor regulation of cold and warmth in children makes them susceptible to exogenous pathogens.

entities.en: poor regulation of cold and warmth

entities_gold.en: poor regulation of cold and warmth

entities_eval.en: poor regulation of cold and warmth

zh: 疮疡初起应辨别毒邪盛衰。
en: At the onset of sores and ulcers, the strength of pathogenic toxins should be differentiated.

zh: 外科辨证应结合局部症状和全身证候。
en: Surgical syndrome differentiation should combine local symptoms with systemic manifestations.

zh: 脓腐脱尽后应促进生肌收口。
en: After pus and slough are removed, granulation growth and wound closure should be promoted.

zh: 藏象反映内脏功能在体表的表现。
en: Viscera manifestations reflect the functions of internal organs on the body surface.

zh: 脏腑功能失调可通过外在征象表现出来。
en: Dysfunction of Zang-Fu organs can appear through external manifestations.

zh: 五脏以藏精气为主要功能。
en: The five Zang-organs mainly function to store vital essence.

zh: 六腑以传化水谷为主要功能。
en: The six Fu-organs mainly function to transport and transform food and drink.

zh: 五脏功能正常则精气充盛。
en: Normal functions of the five Zang-organs allow vital essence to be abundant.

zh: 六腑通降正常则水谷传化顺畅。
en: Normal descending and free passage of the six Fu-organs enables smooth transformation of food and drink.

zh: 心阳温煦血脉以维持血行。
en: Heart Yang warms the blood vessels to maintain blood circulation.

zh: 心血充足则心神得养。
en: When heart blood is sufficient, the mind is nourished.

zh: 肺宣发功能使津液布散于体表。
en: The dispersing function of the lungs distributes body fluids to the body surface.

zh: 肺肃降功能使水液下输于肾。
en: The descending function of the lungs sends fluids downward to the kidneys.

zh: 脾气升清有助于维持脏器位置。
en: Spleen-Qi ascending the clear helps maintain the position of internal organs.

zh: 脾失升清可出现中气下陷。
en: Failure of the spleen to ascend the clear can cause sinking of middle Qi.

entities_gold.en: spleen failing to ascend the clear

zh: 肝气疏泄正常则情志舒畅。
en: Normal free coursing of Liver-Qi keeps emotions smooth.

zh: 肝气郁结可影响脾胃升降。
en: Stagnation of Liver-Qi can affect the ascent and descent of the spleen and stomach.

entities_gold.en: ascent and descent of spleen and stomach

entities_model.en: ascent and descent of spleen and stomach

zh: 肾精化髓以充养脑髓。
en: Kidney essence transforms into marrow to nourish brain marrow.

zh: 肾气封藏有助于固摄二便。
en: The storing function of kidney-Qi helps control urination and defecation.

zh: 胆气通畅有助于胆汁排泄。
en: Smooth gallbladder Qi helps the excretion of bile.

zh: 胃气和降有助于饮食物下行。
en: Harmonious descent of stomach-Qi helps food and drink move downward.

zh: 大肠传导失常可导致便秘或泄泻。
en: Dysfunction of large-intestine transportation can cause constipation or diarrhea.

zh: 膀胱气化失常可导致小便不利。
en: Dysfunction of urinary-bladder Qi transformation can cause difficult urination.

zh: 经络病变可反映相关脏腑的异常。
en: Meridian disorders can reflect abnormalities of related Zang-Fu organs.

zh: 经气不利可导致疼痛和麻木。
en: Unsmooth channel-Qi can cause pain and numbness.

zh: 经络阻滞可使气血运行受限。
en: Meridian obstruction can restrict the movement of Qi and blood.

zh: 十二经脉循行联系内外上下。
en: The circulation of the twelve regular channels connects the interior and exterior, upper and lower.

zh: 奇经八脉调节正经气血。
en: The eight extraordinary vessels regulate Qi and blood in the regular channels.

zh: 督脉阳气不足可影响一身阳经。
en: Insufficiency of Yang-Qi in the Governor Vessel can affect all Yang channels of the body.

entities.en: all Yang channels of the body

entities_gold.en: all Yang channels of the body

entities_eval.en: all Yang channels of the body

zh: 任脉失调可影响胞胎功能。
en: Disharmony of the Conception Vessel can affect uterine and fetal functions.

zh: 冲脉失调可影响气血运行。
en: Disharmony of the Thoroughfare Vessel can affect the movement of Qi and blood.

zh: 舌色变化有助于判断寒热虚实。
en: Changes in tongue color help identify cold, heat, deficiency and excess.

zh: 舌苔厚薄有助于判断邪正盛衰。
en: The thickness of tongue coating helps judge the strength of pathogens and healthy Qi.

entities.en: strength of pathogens and healthy Qi

entities_gold.en: strength of pathogens and healthy Qi

entities_eval.en: strength of pathogens and healthy Qi

zh: 舌苔润燥可反映津液盛衰。
en: Moistness or dryness of tongue coating can reflect the state of body fluids.

zh: 脉位浮沉有助于辨别表里。
en: Floating or deep pulse position helps distinguish exterior from interior.

zh: 脉率迟数有助于辨别寒热。
en: Slow or rapid pulse rate helps distinguish cold from heat.

zh: 脉力虚实有助于判断正邪盛衰。
en: The strength of the pulse helps judge the relative strength of healthy Qi and pathogens.

zh: 小儿指纹诊察可辅助判断病情浅深。
en: Examination of infantile finger veins can help judge the depth of disease.

zh: 小儿指纹浮现多提示病在表。
en: Superficial infantile finger veins often indicate disease in the exterior.

zh: 小儿指纹沉滞多提示病在里。
en: Deep and stagnant infantile finger veins often indicate disease in the interior.

zh: 小儿面色变化可反映脏腑气血状态。
en: Changes in the complexion of children can reflect the state of Zang-Fu organs, Qi and blood.

zh: 小儿啼哭声音可反映寒热虚实。
en: The crying sound of children can reflect cold, heat, deficiency and excess.

zh: 小儿乳食失调常损伤脾胃运化。
en: Feeding disorder in children often impairs spleen-stomach transportation and transformation.

zh: 肺系病证多与肺失宣降有关。
en: Lung-system syndromes are often related to failure of the lungs to disperse and descend.

entities_gold.en: failure of lungs to disperse and descend

entities_model.en: failure of lungs to disperse and descend

zh: 脾系病证多与运化失常有关。
en: Spleen-system syndromes are often related to dysfunction of transportation and transformation.

zh: 肾系病证多与肾气不足有关。
en: Kidney-system syndromes are often related to insufficiency of kidney-Qi.

zh: 外科阳证多见红肿热痛。
en: Yang-type surgical syndromes often present redness, swelling, heat and pain.

zh: 外科阴证多见色暗、肿平和痛缓。
en: Yin-type surgical syndromes often present dark color, flat swelling and mild pain.

zh: 火毒壅盛可使疮疡迅速化脓。
en: Exuberant fire toxin can make sores and ulcers suppurate rapidly.

zh: 寒凝痰滞可形成阴证肿块。
en: Cold congealing with phlegm stagnation can form Yin-type masses.

zh: 气血亏虚可使疮口久不收敛。
en: Deficiency of Qi and blood can prevent ulcer openings from healing for a long time.

zh: 毒邪内陷可导致外科危重证。
en: Internal sinking of toxins can lead to critical surgical syndromes.

zh: 正气恢复可促进疮面生肌。
en: Recovery of healthy Qi can promote granulation growth on the wound surface.

zh: 阴阳平衡失调可形成寒热虚实变化。
en: Disharmony of Yin-Yang balance can lead to changes of cold, heat, deficiency and excess.

zh: 阴液滋养脏腑组织。
en: Yin fluid nourishes the Zang-Fu organs and tissues.

zh: 阳气温煦不足可形成寒象。
en: Insufficient warming by Yang-Qi can produce cold manifestations.

zh: 阴液亏虚可形成燥热表现。
en: Deficiency of Yin fluid can produce dryness-heat manifestations.

zh: 气机升降出入维持生命活动。
en: The ascending, descending, entering and exiting movements of Qi maintain life activities.

zh: 气机郁滞可影响血液运行。
en: Stagnation of Qi movement can affect blood circulation.

zh: 气机逆乱可导致脏腑功能失常。
en: Reversal and disorder of Qi movement can cause Zang-Fu dysfunction.

zh: 气血不足可使形体失养。
en: Insufficiency of Qi and blood can deprive the body of nourishment.

zh: 津液亏耗可导致口燥咽干。
en: Depletion of body fluids can cause dry mouth and throat.

zh: 精血不足可影响筋骨濡养。
en: Insufficiency of essence and blood can impair nourishment of tendons and bones.

zh: 心气不足可使血脉运行无力。
en: Insufficiency of heart-Qi can weaken movement in the blood vessels.

zh: 心阳不振可影响血脉温通。
en: Weakness of heart Yang can impair warming and free flow of the blood vessels.

zh: 心血不足可使心神失养。
en: Insufficiency of heart blood can deprive the mind of nourishment.

zh: 心阴不足可导致虚热扰心。
en: Insufficiency of heart Yin can cause deficiency heat to disturb the heart.

zh: 肺气闭郁可导致宣降失常。
en: Obstruction and stagnation of lung-Qi can cause disorder of dispersing and descending.

zh: 肺阴亏虚可使肺失滋润。
en: Deficiency of lung Yin can deprive the lungs of moisture.

zh: 肺热壅盛可灼伤津液。
en: Exuberant lung heat can scorch body fluids.

zh: 痰浊阻肺可影响气道通畅。
en: Turbid phlegm obstructing the lungs can impair patency of the Qi passage.

zh: 脾气虚弱可使水谷运化失常。
en: Weakness of spleen-Qi can disorder transformation and transportation of food and drink.

entities.en: transformation and transportation of food and drink

entities_gold.en: transformation and transportation of food and drink

entities_eval.en: transformation and transportation of food and drink

zh: 脾阳不足可使寒湿内生。
en: Insufficiency of spleen Yang can cause endogenous cold-dampness.

zh: 脾阴不足可影响胃肠濡润。
en: Insufficiency of spleen Yin can impair moistening of the stomach and intestines.

zh: 脾虚失统可导致血不循经。
en: Spleen deficiency failing to control can cause blood to leave the vessels.

zh: 肝气不舒可导致气郁化火。
en: Unsmooth Liver-Qi can cause Qi depression to transform into fire.

zh: 肝火亢盛可扰动心神。
en: Hyperactive Liver-fire can disturb the mind.

zh: 肝血不足可导致目失所养。
en: Insufficiency of liver blood can deprive the eyes of nourishment.

zh: 肝阳偏亢可上扰清窍。
en: Hyperactivity of Liver-Yang can disturb the clear orifices upward.

zh: 肾气亏虚可影响封藏功能。
en: Deficiency of kidney-Qi can impair the storing function.

zh: 肾阴亏虚可导致虚火内扰。
en: Deficiency of kidney Yin can cause deficiency fire to disturb internally.

zh: 肾阳虚弱可导致水液不化。
en: Weakness of kidney Yang can cause failure to transform body fluids.

zh: 肾精亏损可影响齿骨发育。
en: Depletion of kidney essence can affect development of teeth and bones.

zh: 胆气不利可影响胆汁疏泄。
en: Unsmooth gallbladder Qi can affect the free flow of bile.

zh: 胃热炽盛可耗伤胃阴。
en: Exuberant stomach heat can consume stomach Yin.

zh: 胃寒凝滞可影响受纳腐熟。
en: Stomach cold with stagnation can impair reception and decomposition.

zh: 小肠气化失常可影响清浊分泌。
en: Dysfunction of small-intestine Qi transformation can affect separation of the clear and turbid.

zh: 大肠津亏可导致传导不利。
en: Fluid deficiency in the large intestine can cause difficult transportation.

zh: 膀胱湿热可影响气化排尿。
en: Dampness-heat in the urinary bladder can affect Qi transformation and urination.

zh: 三焦不利可影响水道通调。
en: Unsmooth triple Jiao can affect regulation of the water pathways.

zh: 卫气不足可使肌表失固。
en: Insufficiency of defensive Qi can make the superficies insecure.

zh: 营气不足可影响血液化生。
en: Insufficiency of nutritive Qi can affect blood production.

zh: 宗气不足可影响呼吸和心脉。
en: Insufficiency of pectoral Qi can affect respiration and the heart vessels.

zh: 元气亏虚可使脏腑功能衰退。
en: Deficiency of primordial Qi can make Zang-Fu functions decline.

zh: 小儿肺脏娇嫩，外邪易从口鼻入侵。
en: The lungs of children are delicate, and exogenous pathogens easily invade through the mouth and nose.

zh: 小儿脾胃薄弱，乳食不节易成积滞。
en: The spleen and stomach of children are weak, and improper feeding easily forms accumulation.

zh: 小儿肾气未充，骨髓发育尚未完善。
en: Kidney-Qi in children is not yet abundant, and bone marrow development is not yet complete.

zh: 小儿热病易出现热极生风。
en: Febrile diseases in children easily lead to extreme heat generating wind.

zh: 小儿泄泻日久可损伤脾肾阳气。
en: Prolonged diarrhea in children can damage Yang-Qi of the spleen and kidneys.

zh: 疮疡毒邪炽盛可导致红肿热痛。
en: Exuberant toxins in sores and ulcers can cause redness, swelling, heat and pain.

zh: 疮疡气血不足可使愈合迟缓。
en: Deficiency of Qi and blood in sores and ulcers can delay healing.

zh: 阴证疮疡多由寒痰凝滞而成。
en: Yin-type sores and ulcers are often caused by stagnation of cold phlegm.

zh: 阳证疮疡多由火毒壅盛而成。
en: Yang-type sores and ulcers are often caused by exuberant fire toxin.

zh: 神志清楚常提示心神得养。
en: Clear consciousness often indicates that the mind is nourished.

zh: 神志昏蒙常提示痰火扰心。
en: Clouded consciousness often indicates phlegm-fire disturbing the heart.

zh: 面色萎黄多与脾虚气血不足有关。
en: A sallow complexion is often related to spleen deficiency with insufficiency of Qi and blood.

zh: 面色晦暗常提示瘀血内阻。
en: A dark complexion often indicates internal obstruction by blood stasis.

zh: 面色浮白多与阳气不足有关。
en: A pale and puffy complexion is often related to insufficiency of Yang-Qi.

zh: 舌体胖大多提示水湿内停。
en: An enlarged tongue body often indicates internal retention of water-dampness.

zh: 舌体瘦薄多提示阴血不足。
en: A thin tongue body often indicates insufficiency of Yin and blood.

zh: 舌有齿痕多提示脾虚湿盛。
en: Tooth marks on the tongue often indicate spleen deficiency with exuberant dampness.

zh: 舌质暗紫常提示瘀血阻滞。
en: A dark-purple tongue body often indicates obstruction by blood stasis.

zh: 苔腻多提示湿浊或痰饮内停。
en: A greasy coating often indicates internal retention of damp turbidity or phlegm-fluid.

zh: 苔少多提示胃阴不足。
en: Scanty coating often indicates insufficiency of stomach Yin.

zh: 剥苔多提示胃气胃阴受损。
en: Peeled coating often indicates damage to stomach Qi and stomach Yin.

zh: 口渴喜冷饮多提示里热炽盛。
en: Thirst with preference for cold drinks often indicates exuberant interior heat.

zh: 口淡不渴多提示寒湿困脾。
en: Bland taste without thirst often indicates cold-dampness encumbering the spleen.

zh: 口苦常与肝胆湿热有关。
en: Bitter taste is often related to dampness-heat in the liver and gallbladder.

zh: 食少纳呆多与脾失健运有关。
en: Poor appetite is often related to failure of the spleen to transport properly.

zh: 腹胀喜按多提示脾胃虚弱。
en: Abdominal distension relieved by pressure often indicates weakness of the spleen and stomach.

zh: 腹痛拒按多提示实邪阻滞。
en: Abdominal pain aggravated by pressure often indicates obstruction by excess pathogens.

zh: 便溏多与脾虚湿盛有关。
en: Loose stool is often related to spleen deficiency with exuberant dampness.

zh: 便秘多与津亏或热结有关。
en: Constipation is often related to fluid depletion or heat accumulation.

zh: 气虚卫表不固可导致自汗易感。
en: Qi deficiency with insecurity of the defensive exterior can cause spontaneous sweating and susceptibility to pathogens.

zh: 小便清长多提示阳虚内寒。
en: Clear profuse urine often indicates internal cold due to Yang deficiency.

entities.en: internal cold due to Yang deficiency

entities_gold.en: internal cold due to Yang deficiency

entities_eval.en: internal cold due to Yang deficiency

zh: 自汗多与卫气不固有关。
en: Spontaneous sweating is often related to insecurity of defensive Qi.

zh: 盗汗多与阴虚内热有关。
en: Night sweating is often related to internal heat due to Yin deficiency.

entities.en: internal heat due to Yin deficiency

entities_gold.en: internal heat due to Yin deficiency

entities_model.en: internal heat due to Yin deficiency

entities_eval.en: internal heat due to Yin deficiency

zh: 寒热往来常提示少阳枢机不利。
en: Alternating chills and fever often indicate dysfunction of the Shaoyang pivot.

zh: 潮热多与阴虚或阳明热盛有关。
en: Tidal fever is often related to Yin deficiency or exuberant Yangming heat.

zh: 浮肿按之凹陷多与水湿泛滥有关。
en: Pitting edema is often related to overflow of water-dampness.

zh: 固定疼痛多提示瘀血阻络。
en: Fixed pain often indicates blood stasis obstructing collaterals.

zh: 游走疼痛多提示风邪阻络。
en: Wandering pain often indicates wind pathogen obstructing collaterals.

zh: 重着疼痛多提示湿邪困阻。
en: Heavy pain often indicates obstruction by dampness pathogen.

zh: 胀痛多与气滞有关。
en: Distending pain is often related to Qi stagnation.

zh: 冷痛多与寒邪凝滞有关。
en: Cold pain is often related to congealing by cold pathogen.

zh: 灼痛多与热邪壅盛有关。
en: Burning pain is often related to exuberance of heat pathogen.

zh: 麻木多与气血不荣或痰瘀阻络有关。
en: Numbness is often related to malnourishment by Qi and blood or obstruction by phlegm and blood stasis.

zh: 胸闷多与痰浊阻滞胸阳有关。
en: Chest oppression is often related to turbid phlegm obstructing chest Yang.

zh: 心悸多与心气心血不足有关。
en: Palpitation is often related to insufficiency of heart Qi or heart blood.

zh: 失眠多与心神失养或心火扰神有关。
en: Insomnia is often related to malnutrition of the mind or heart fire disturbing the spirit.

zh: 眩晕多与肝阳上扰或气血不足有关。
en: Dizziness is often related to upward disturbance by Liver-Yang or insufficiency of Qi and blood.

zh: 耳鸣多与肾精不足或肝火上扰有关。
en: Tinnitus is often related to kidney essence insufficiency or upward disturbance by Liver-fire.

zh: 痰湿内盛可阻碍脾胃升降。
en: Internal exuberance of phlegm-dampness can obstruct the ascent and descent of the spleen and stomach.

entities_gold.en: ascent and descent of spleen and stomach

entities_model.en: ascent and descent of spleen and stomach

zh: 干咳少痰多提示肺阴不足。
en: Dry cough with scanty sputum often indicates insufficiency of lung Yin.

zh: 喘息气短多与肺肾两虚有关。
en: Panting with shortness of breath is often related to deficiency of the lungs and kidneys.

zh: 小儿高热抽搐多与热极生风有关。
en: High fever with convulsions in children is often related to extreme heat generating wind.

zh: 小儿食积化热可导致腹胀口臭。
en: Food accumulation transforming into heat in children can cause abdominal distension and halitosis.

zh: 小儿脾虚夹湿可导致久泻。
en: Spleen deficiency with dampness in children can cause prolonged diarrhea.

zh: 小儿肺脾不足可导致反复咳喘。
en: Insufficiency of the lungs and spleen in children can cause recurrent cough and panting.

zh: 疮疡红肿高突多属阳证。
en: Sores with red elevated swelling mostly belong to Yang syndrome.

zh: 疮疡色暗平塌多属阴证。
en: Sores with dark flat swelling mostly belong to Yin syndrome.

zh: 脓出黄稠多提示正气尚充。
en: Yellow thick pus often indicates that healthy Qi remains sufficient.

zh: 脓出清稀多提示正气虚弱。
en: Clear thin pus often indicates weakness of healthy Qi.

zh: 表虚证多与卫气不固有关。
en: Exterior deficiency syndrome is often related to insecurity of defensive Qi.

zh: 表实证多与外邪束表有关。
en: Exterior excess syndrome is often related to exogenous pathogens constraining the exterior.

zh: 里寒证多由阳气不足或寒邪内盛引起。
en: Interior cold syndrome is often caused by Yang-Qi deficiency or internal excess of cold pathogen.

zh: 里热证多由热邪内盛引起。
en: Interior heat syndrome is often caused by internal exuberance of heat pathogen.

zh: 虚寒证反映阳气亏虚。
en: Deficiency cold syndrome reflects deficiency of Yang-Qi.

zh: 虚热证反映阴液亏虚。
en: Deficiency heat syndrome reflects deficiency of Yin fluid.

zh: 实寒证反映寒邪偏盛。
en: Excess cold syndrome reflects exuberance of cold pathogen.

zh: 实热证反映热邪偏盛。
en: Excess heat syndrome reflects exuberance of heat pathogen.

zh: 气虚发热多由中气不足引起。
en: Fever due to Qi deficiency is often caused by insufficiency of middle Qi.

zh: 阴虚发热多由阴液不足引起。
en: Fever due to Yin deficiency is often caused by insufficiency of Yin fluid.

zh: 阳郁发热多由阳气郁遏引起。
en: Fever due to Yang constraint is often caused by constraint of Yang-Qi.

zh: 血瘀发热多由瘀血阻滞引起。
en: Fever due to blood stasis is often caused by obstruction of blood stasis.

zh: 痰热内扰可导致心神不宁。
en: Internal disturbance by phlegm-heat can cause restlessness of the mind.

zh: 湿热蕴结可阻碍气机运行。
en: Accumulation of dampness-heat can obstruct the movement of Qi.

zh: 寒湿内阻可损伤脾阳。
en: Internal obstruction by cold-dampness can damage spleen Yang.

zh: 风痰阻络可导致肢体麻木。
en: Wind-phlegm obstructing the collaterals can cause numbness of the limbs.

zh: 痰火扰神可导致神志异常。
en: Phlegm-fire disturbing the spirit can cause abnormal mental activity.

zh: 肝郁脾虚可导致腹胀便溏。
en: Liver depression with spleen deficiency can cause abdominal distension and loose stool.

zh: 肝胃不和可导致胃脘胀痛。
en: Disharmony between the liver and stomach can cause epigastric distending pain.

zh: 心肺气虚可导致胸闷气短。
en: Qi deficiency of the heart and lungs can cause chest oppression and shortness of breath.

zh: 心肾阳虚可导致水气凌心。
en: Yang deficiency of the heart and kidneys can cause water-Qi to intimidate the heart.

zh: 肺肾阴虚可导致虚火灼肺。
en: Yin deficiency of the lungs and kidneys can cause deficiency fire to scorch the lungs.

zh: 脾肺气虚可影响水液输布。
en: Qi deficiency of the spleen and lungs can affect distribution of body fluids.

zh: 脾胃湿热可导致纳呆脘痞。
en: Dampness-heat in the spleen and stomach can cause poor appetite and epigastric fullness.

zh: 肝胆湿热可导致胁痛口苦。
en: Dampness-heat in the liver and gallbladder can cause hypochondriac pain and bitter taste.

zh: 肾虚水泛可导致浮肿喘促。
en: Kidney deficiency with water overflow can cause edema and panting.

zh: 命门火衰可导致畏寒肢冷。
en: Decline of Mingmen fire can cause aversion to cold and cold limbs.

zh: 心血瘀阻可导致胸痛心悸。
en: Obstruction of heart blood by stasis can cause chest pain and palpitation.

entities.en: obstruction of heart blood by stasis

entities_gold.en: obstruction of heart blood by stasis

entities_eval.en: obstruction of heart blood by stasis

zh: 胃阴亏虚可导致饥不欲食。
en: Deficiency of stomach Yin can cause hunger without desire to eat.

zh: 肺燥津伤可导致干咳少痰。
en: Lung dryness damaging fluids can cause dry cough with scanty sputum.

zh: 风寒犯肺可导致鼻塞流清涕。
en: Wind-cold invading the lungs can cause nasal obstruction and clear nasal discharge.

zh: 风热犯肺可导致咽痛咳黄痰。
en: Wind-heat invading the lungs can cause sore throat and cough with yellow sputum.

zh: 食积化热可导致口臭腹胀。
en: Food accumulation transforming into heat can cause halitosis and abdominal distension.

zh: 脾虚食积可导致纳差便溏。
en: Food accumulation due to spleen deficiency can cause poor intake and loose stool.

zh: 肾气不足可导致小儿发育迟缓。
en: Insufficiency of kidney-Qi can cause delayed development in children.

zh: 脾胃虚弱可使小儿形体消瘦。
en: Weakness of the spleen and stomach can make children emaciated.

zh: 肺卫失固可使小儿易感外邪。
en: Insecurity of the lung-defense system can make children susceptible to exogenous pathogens.

zh: 肝风夹痰可导致小儿抽动。
en: Liver wind with phlegm can cause tic movements in children.

zh: 心脾两虚可影响小儿注意力。
en: Deficiency of the heart and spleen can affect attention in children.

zh: 肾精不足可影响小儿智力发育。
en: Insufficiency of kidney essence can affect intellectual development in children.

zh: 风热毒邪可导致咽喉肿痛。
en: Wind-heat toxin can cause swelling and pain of the throat.

zh: 温毒壅盛可导致腮部肿痛。
en: Exuberant warm toxin can cause swelling and pain of the parotid region.

entities_gold.en: swelling and pain of parotid region

zh: 湿热蕴肤可导致皮疹瘙痒。
en: Dampness-heat accumulating in the skin can cause rash and pruritus.

zh: 血热妄行可导致紫斑出血。
en: Reckless movement of blood due to heat can cause purpura and bleeding.

entities.en: reckless movement of blood due to heat

entities_gold.en: reckless movement of blood due to heat

entities_model.en: reckless movement of blood due to heat

entities_eval.en: reckless movement of blood due to heat

zh: 外科火毒炽盛可导致局部灼痛。
en: Exuberant surgical fire toxin can cause local burning pain.

zh: 外科寒痰凝滞可导致肿块坚硬。
en: Surgical cold phlegm stagnation can cause hard masses.

zh: 气血凝滞可导致疮疡疼痛。
en: Stagnation of Qi and blood can cause pain in sores and ulcers.

zh: 经络阻塞可导致外科肿痛。
en: Meridian obstruction can cause surgical swelling and pain.

zh: 正虚毒恋可使疮口难敛。
en: Deficiency of healthy Qi with lingering toxins can make ulcer openings difficult to heal.

zh: 腐肉未脱可影响疮面生肌。
en: Retained slough can affect granulation growth on the wound surface.
